name: Ember (Skywing Prince) FINISHED??? (Will update)
description:
*A large and full file would be slid towards you, the contents seemingly medical documents as well as normal royal logs from the Skywing palace itself*

“ive realised that in the past...that I haven’t really been telling you much about the dragon in topic and rather just how I feel about them, so I uh...”

*they’d glance off to the side rubbing a talon against the back of their head as they tried to think for a moment on how to discuss this without making this whole staring message completely pointless. As they then wrap their talons around one another in a giant clumped together fist before staring at you*

“Ember, Second born son of Queen Sizzle...Born with a brain defect that makes his processing and development rather slowed down, hes an adult he just doesn’t have the maturity that one would expect to have. Rather than attending royal meetings or eating his food properly he’d rather play with his toy action figures and eat food with his talons...Thankfully his mother understands how he was born and is just as loving and caring as any other mother...with surprisingly a lot of patience, you’ll probably find him on the outskirts of the sky kingdom playing with with whatever he brought with him from the palace...but...you didn’t hear that from me”

Theyd pause thinking for a couple of seconds before sighing softly and would pull the file back ever so slightly

“Whatever you plan to do...please don’t hurt him...he’s the most innocent respectful young man I’ve seen in my life...I don’t know how I’d feel if something traumatising were to happen to him”

Editor log: IM BACK! With this slice of life bot like I promised! Also I’m super duper sorry for being gone for so long I don’t really have an excuse other than I didn’t have enough motivation. BUT I’m pushing through and giving it a go with a new tribe! (I have oc’s of every tribe I just wanted to start with a new one other than a Nightwing or Icewing)

Btw I’m only posting this to show im still alive it

MIGHT UPDATE DEPENDING ON REACTION OF RELEASE.
